title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Dinara
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Dinara assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Dinara
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Dinara assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
